params.name: Boy with Apple
params.description:
On Oct 18, 1932 AD, Gustava and Nada stole Boy with Apple, which was rightfully theirs, and went on their way home.
Boy with Apple is a precious oil painting in a certain lady's collection. After she passed away, this painting was given to an old acquaintance, Mr. Gustava, manager of the Great Bodepust Inn, in her will. But Gustava had to go through a lot of trouble to get the painting. He and his doorman, Nada, finally rightfully owned the painting and obtained the right to manage the inn af …
